skipped_triggers.name: High ICMP ping loss
skipped_triggers.expression: min(/Cisco IOS by SNMP/icmppingloss,5m)>{$ICMP_LOSS_WARN} and min(/Cisco IOS by SNMP/icmppingloss,5m)<100

skipped_triggers.name: Device has been replaced
